diagrams.title: sigsuspend() Function Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the atomic operation of sigsuspend() - how it changes signal mask and waits in one atomic step
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the atomic nature and automatic mask restoration

diagrams.title: Lost Wakeup Problem vs sigsuspend() Solution
diagrams.description: Comparison showing how signals can be lost with pause() and how sigsuspend() prevents this
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the race condition and solution

diagrams.title: Signal Mask States During sigsuspend()
diagrams.description: Shows signal mask before, during, and after sigsuspend() call
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how mask changes and is restored automatically
